product_description: BrainPOP Jr. provides educational content for students in grades K-3, utilizing animated movies, interactive activities, and educational games across various subjects like ELA, Math, Science, and Social Studies to build foundational knowledge and essential skills.

vendor_resources.justification: Official BrainPOP accessibility page detailing commitment to WCAG 2.1 Level AA and Section 508, and listing features applicable to BrainPOP Jr.

acr_reports.title: BrainPOP LLC Accessibility Conformance Report WCAG Edition
